notes: Static X<0 branch is cubic, but P_XX<0 gives a ghost in the zero-temperature single-field theory.
Separates density and force roles, but does not itself derive or regularize the force operator.
Independent Q and Y invariants avoid the single-invariant no-go; the cubic truncation degenerates at zero gradient.
Retain Phi for condensate/topology and use a separate preferred-frame force sector; requires UVIR-003.
